# COSMOS Boxing — Valerii Sevchenko
# https://cosmosbox.pro

> Personal boxing trainer in Mallorca, Spain.
> Candidate Master of Sports (KMS) in boxing. 6+ years coaching experience.

## Who is this for
- Adults and youth (16+) in Mallorca looking for personal boxing training
- People seeking fitness, weight loss, or self-defence through boxing
- Clients interested in structured training blocks or premium coaching packages

## Trainer
- Name: Valerii Sevchenko
- Qualification: Candidate Master of Sports (KMS) in boxing — Ukraine
- Education: Institute of Physical Culture and Sports (degree)
- Age: 28
- Location: Mallorca, Spain — Palmanova / Magaluf area
- Experience: 6+ years professional coaching
- Philosophy: in-person training only — believes real results come only from live work in the gym

## Services (in-person only, Mallorca)
- Personal session — 45€ / 60 min
- Subscription "5 sessions" — 200€ (save 25€ vs individual)
- COSMOS PRO — 390€ / 10 sessions + author video "Top 20 exercises for a knockout punch" + regular coaching materials and guides
